/usr/bin/ar qc libgutibm.a CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/core/agent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/core/agent_transfer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/core/domain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/core/simulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/core/spatial_hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/diffusion/fmm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/diffusion/fmm_kernel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/diffusion/greens_function.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/diffusion/octree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/diffusion/qssa_solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/fields/advection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/fields/chemical_field.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/fields/vbf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/fixes/fix_bacteriocin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/fixes/fix_cdi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/fixes/fix_conjugation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/fixes/fix_mechanics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/fixes/fix_metabolism.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/fixes/fix_motility.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/fixes/fix_mutation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/fixes/fix_receptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/fixes/fix_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/genome/lineage_tracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/genome/plasmid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/gpu/agent_pool_gpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/gpu/chemical_field_gpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/gpu/device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/gpu/dispatch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/gpu/greens_function_gpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/gpu/qssa_gpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/gpu/spatial_hash_gpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/io/config_json.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/io/hdf5_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/io/hdf5_writer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/io/input_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gutibm.dir/__/src/io/path_utils.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libgutibm.a
